title: Budget Exhaustion
setup: Creates one dominant-CPM campaign with budget == CPM, so spend/impression = CPM/1000 reaches the budget at exactly 1000 impressions. Drives 1500 requests and fires win notices to accrue spend.
expected_standard_behaviour: The campaign stops serving once cumulative spend reaches the budget (after 1000 impressions).
expected_verdict_vs_voise_adserver: GAP — the auction's eligibility check reads campaign.spent / daily_spent, but /track/win increments campaign.spend, and win attribution requires a line-item -> campaign link. The loop never closes, so the campaign keeps serving past its budget.
